mapper.select: SELECT c.no, c.board_no, c.member_no, c.content, TO_CHAR(c.regdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS reg_date, m.name, m.member_id AS member_id FROM board_comment c JOIN member m ON c.member_no = m.no WHERE c.board_no = #{boardNo} ORDER BY c.no ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_comment (no, board_no, member_no, content, regdate) VALUES (board_comment_seq.NEXTVAL, #{boardNo}, #{memberNo}, #{content}, SYSDATE)
